news.t: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PYPU is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily PYPL Bull 2X ETF (PYPU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of PayPal Holdings Inc. (TICKER: PYPL). PYPU was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs
data.text: New York, New York, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today announced the launch of four new ETFs offering 2X daily exposure to ...
